title: transparency - SMP Pack
description: SMP Pack, with glassy/transparent UI and quality of life features
body:
# Description

_**transparency**_ is a clean and modern Minecraft resource pack made for **SMP** and **PVP** players who prefer a minimal, distraction-free experience. It keeps the vanilla style while improving visibility and refining the overall interface with a sleek glass and acrylic-inspired design.

![The picture shows a screenshot of the Minecraft ui, like hotbar, hearts and more.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba3289f36ff171233209265aba81144d7504de69_0.webp)

The UI has been carefully reworked with transparent and soft blur effects, giving menus and inventories a smooth, professional look. The glassy design creates a lightweight and immersive atmosphere without affecting readability or performance.



## Features

Glass / transparent styled transparent UI

effects on menus

Reworked GUI elements

Reduced fire overlay (No Fire)

Side-positioned shield model

Small Totem of Undying

Small Golden Apple

Small Ender Pearl

3D End Crystal

![A screenshot, that shows the 3d endcristal and the reworked mace.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2e914f9c2af6f35da787a1751bcc762082a177e.png)
